Interactive Display Solutions in Singapore — Touchscreen Kiosks, Whiteboards & Wayfinding

Transform passive viewers into active users. We deploy interactive whiteboards, wayfinding maps, and self-service terminals that provide intuitive user experiences. Perfect for shopping malls, lobbies, and educational institutions.

Engage with touch technology and turn every screen into a two‑way conversation instead of a one‑way broadcast.

Transform Passive Viewers into Active Users with Interactive Digital Signage

Transform passive viewers into active users with Auronova’s interactive display solutions. By combining high‑definition screens with responsive touch interfaces, we help you create immersive experiences that invite people to explore, discover and take action.

Interactive displays are ideal wherever you need to deliver rich information quickly and clearly. Instead of standing in front of a static sign, your visitors can tap, swipe and search for exactly what they need. This not only improves engagement, it also reduces pressure on frontline staff and makes your space feel more modern, intelligent and intuitive.

From shopping malls and corporate lobbies to schools and training centres, Auronova designs interactive solutions that are easy to use, easy to maintain and aligned with your brand. Each deployment is planned around your environment, audience and goals so the technology feels helpful, not overwhelming.

Transform Passive Viewers into Active Users

With traditional digital signage, visitors simply watch whatever is on screen. Interactive displays change that dynamic. They invite people to participate, giving them control over the information they see and the journey they follow.

This shift from passive viewing to active interaction delivers several benefits:

Higher attention and dwell time as users engage with content they choose

Greater relevance — each person can filter and access information that matters to them

Better recall since hands-on interaction strengthens understanding and memory

Reduced queues and repetitive enquiries through self-service touchscreen access

Auronova designs interfaces that make this interaction feel natural from the first touch. Clear on‑screen prompts and intuitive layouts guide users step by step, so even first‑time visitors can navigate with confidence.

Interactive Whiteboards for Education & Business Collaboration

Interactive whiteboards combine the familiarity of a traditional board with the power of digital content. They are ideal for classrooms, training rooms, meeting spaces and innovation labs where teams need to collaborate visually.

With Auronova’s interactive whiteboards, you can:

Present lessons or slides and annotate directly on screen during sessions

Save, share or export session notes so nothing is lost

Switch between writing, browsing and multimedia viewing instantly

Support hybrid sessions combining in-room interaction with remote participation

Teachers, trainers and facilitators gain a flexible tool that adapts to different teaching styles and group activities. Students and participants are more engaged when they can interact with diagrams, drag items around the screen or contribute ideas directly on the display.

Digital Wayfinding Kiosks for Shopping Malls & Large Venues

In large or complex environments, wayfinding is one of the most valuable uses of interactive displays. Auronova’s wayfinding maps help visitors get where they need to be without confusion, frustration or constant reliance on staff.

Our wayfinding solutions typically allow users to:

Search for destinations by name, category or level — fashion, pharmacy, meeting rooms

Step-by-step route maps highlighting the path from the user's current location

Filterable points of interest including restrooms, ATMs, lifts, food courts and information counters

Multi-language support for diverse visitor audiences

These interactive maps are especially effective in shopping malls, hospitals, campuses, convention centres and large office complexes. By making navigation simple and intuitive, you improve visitor satisfaction and reduce congestion around traditional information counters.

Self-Service Touchscreen Terminals for Faster Customer Service

Self‑service terminals empower users to complete simple tasks on their own, any time of day, without waiting in line. Auronova designs self‑service kiosks that are straightforward and reliable, making everyday interactions smoother for both visitors and staff.

Depending on your needs, self‑service terminals can support:

Information lookup — services, opening hours and FAQs

Queue or appointment registration

Feedback and survey submission

Ticket, voucher or queue slip printing

In shopping malls, these terminals can provide store information and promotions. In corporate or government lobbies, they can handle visitor registration and basic enquiries. In educational institutions, they can help students access campus information and updates. By handling routine questions and tasks, self‑service terminals free your team to focus on higher‑value interactions.

Intuitive Touchscreen UX Design for High-Traffic Environments

The success of any interactive display depends on how easy it is to use. Auronova focuses on creating intuitive experiences that feel natural and effortless, even to users who rarely interact with digital kiosks.

We design every interface with:

Clear calls-to-action — Start, Find a Store, Get Directions

Simple, logical menu structures that minimise the steps needed

Large, touch-friendly buttons and high-contrast visuals for readability

Consistent navigation with obvious routes back, home or to language selection

By thinking through each journey from the user’s perspective, we reduce friction and encourage more people to interact. The result is technology that supports your goals without getting in the way.

Interactive Touchscreen Solutions for Shopping Malls

Shopping malls are dynamic environments where shoppers need information quickly: which stores are nearby, what promotions are running, and how to get from point A to point B. Auronova’s interactive displays are tailored to meet these needs.

In malls, interactive solutions can:

Directory and wayfinding maps that update automatically as tenants change

Current promotions, events and seasonal campaigns alongside navigation

Self-service terminals for general enquiries or loyalty programme information

By placing interactive displays at key locations such as entrances, lift lobbies and junctions, you help visitors orient themselves instantly. This leads to better traffic flow, improved tenant visibility and a more enjoyable shopping experience.

Interactive Display Systems for Corporate Lobbies & Reception Areas

First impressions matter. In corporate lobbies, interactive displays showcase who you are and what you do in a more engaging way than static posters or brochures.

Typical uses in lobbies include:

Interactive company overviews — explore services, locations and case studies

Digital directories for multi-tenant buildings

Self-check-in kiosks for streamlined visitor registration and badge printing

These experiences communicate professionalism, innovation and attention to detail. They also relieve reception staff from repetitive direction‑giving and data entry, allowing them to focus on personalised hospitality.

Interactive Displays for Schools, Universities & Educational Institutions

Schools, colleges and training centres can use interactive displays to support both administrative needs and learning experiences.

On campus, interactive kiosks and wayfinding maps can help students and visitors:

Classroom, lab, office and facilities wayfinding

Event calendars, campus announcements and news boards

Programme and student services information access points

In classrooms and training rooms, interactive whiteboards make teaching more dynamic and collaborative. Students can interact directly with content, while teachers can adapt lessons on the fly to different learning speeds and styles.

By deploying interactive displays across campus, educational institutions signal a commitment to technology‑enhanced learning and student experience.

Reliable Hardware, Professional Installation & Ongoing Support

Interactive displays handle constant touches and frequent use, especially in high‑traffic locations. Auronova selects commercial‑grade displays and components designed for these demands, and pairs them with secure mounting and enclosures appropriate for public spaces.

Beyond deployment, we provide:

Professional installation for stable operation and clean cable management

Staff training so your team can manage basic usage and content updates confidently

Maintenance and support services to keep your interactive display network running long-term

You gain peace of mind knowing that each interactive screen is backed by a team that understands both the hardware and the user experience.

Frequently Asked Questions — Interactive Display Solutions

What is an interactive display?

An interactive display is a screen that responds to touch, so people can tap, swipe, and search instead of simply watching. It turns a one-way message into a two-way experience, letting users choose the information they see and the path they take through it. You’ll find them as touchscreen kiosks, interactive whiteboards, digital wayfinding maps, and self-service terminals. We install interactive displays in shopping malls, corporate lobbies, schools, and public venues to lift engagement and take some pressure off frontline staff.

What is the difference between an interactive kiosk and a standard touchscreen display?

A standard touchscreen display is really just a screen with touch built in, often used for presentations, whiteboards, or browsing. An interactive kiosk is a complete, self-contained unit that brings together a touchscreen, an enclosure, mounting, and purpose-built software, all designed for unattended public use like wayfinding, self-check-in, or looking up information. Put simply, the touchscreen is a component, while the kiosk is a finished solution built around it. We supply both and will recommend whichever suits your use case and setting.

How long do touchscreen displays last?

Commercial-grade touchscreens usually last around 5 to 10 years, and modern projected-capacitive panels are rated for hundreds of millions of touches. Industrial-grade units in well-kept environments can go beyond 10 years. Consumer-grade screens, on the other hand, wear out far quicker under heavy public use. What really affects lifespan is how intensively the screen is used, along with heat, dust, moisture, and build quality. We specify commercial-grade displays with hard-wearing glass and proper enclosures so they stand up to constant public handling.

How durable are touchscreen displays in high-traffic public spaces?

Very durable, as long as the right hardware is chosen. Commercial interactive displays use solid tempered or laminated glass fronts that resist scratches and knocks, and many are rated to keep out dust and moisture. Unlike older resistive screens with moving layers, modern projected-capacitive touch has no parts that rub and wear, so the sensor stays accurate for years. The trick is pairing the right panel with secure mounting and a protective enclosure. We pick commercial-grade, public-ready hardware built for the constant touches you’d expect in malls, lobbies, and campuses.

Can interactive kiosks work offline or in areas with poor connectivity?

Yes. Interactive kiosks keep their content and applications stored locally, so the core functions, such as wayfinding, information lookup, and self-service tasks, keep working even with no internet. A connection is mainly needed for live data, remote content updates, or transactions that have to go over a network. If your location has patchy connectivity, we can set the kiosk up to run reliably offline and sync any updates whenever a connection becomes available.

Can wayfinding and kiosk content be updated without technical assistance?

Yes. Our interactive solutions are managed through a content management system with a straightforward dashboard, so your team can update directory listings, promotions, maps, and other information without any coding or vendor help. Directory and wayfinding content can even refresh automatically as tenants or facilities change. We also provide training and documentation at handover so staff can confidently manage the everyday content, and our support team is on hand for anything more technical.

Bring Your Spaces to Life with Interactive Display Solutions in Singapore

Interactive displays are a natural evolution of digital signage, turning screens from static noticeboards into smart, engaging touchpoints. With Auronova, you get a partner who can design, deploy and support interactive whiteboards, wayfinding maps and self‑service terminals that truly add value to your spaces.

 

From shopping malls and corporate lobbies to educational institutions and beyond, we help you transform passive viewers into active participants. If you are ready to enhance your environment with intuitive, touch‑enabled experiences, Auronova’s interactive display solutions are ready to bring your vision to life.
